completions.text: Walk Kendal Street and note which shopfronts are newly vacant

evidence.note: Three new vacancies between the chemist and the bakery.

completions.text: Distribute Card 04: Basic Income along Brisbane Street — photograph the last letterbox

evidence.note: Forty cards out, last letterbox photographed.

_README: Deliberately UNENCRYPTED demo dispatch. Rename to dispatch-demo.json, drop it in your dropzone folder and SCAN: the Airlock will raise UNENCRYPTED and BATCH flags (the two completions are 2.5s apart). Real dispatches from Frontline arrive AES-GCM sealed.
